CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2024 Set For Trial On Nov-18-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Consolidated Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admission, Request For Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-21-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARIPOSA PROPERTY MANAGMENT, LLC'S Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admission, Request For Documents, And For Sanctions

The unopposed motion is denied as the accompanying Proof of Service does not show Defendant Figueroa was served via personal service, and electronic service upon self-represented parties requires the consent of the self-represented party which was not demonstrated by the moving papers. C.C.P. sec. 1010.6(c), CRC rule 2.251(b), and San Francisco Local Rule 2.11.D. The motion also improperly combined various motions which violates the filing fee requirements of Govt. C. sec. 70617(a)(f). Parties are lastly reminded to adhere to all applicable rules of court, including local rules applicable to titling of discovery motion papers.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling by email to Judge Pro Tem William Lynn at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
